author: eugeny-dementev
description: Generate AI agent briefs from the current note using path-based templates and task extraction. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Eugeny Dementev
manifest.description: Generate AI agent briefs from the current note using path-based templates and task extraction.
manifest.name: Briefmaker

name: Briefmaker

releases.author: eugeny-dementev
releases.description:
# 0.6.0

## Highlights
- Rule matching now considers both vault-relative and full paths, fixing regex rules like `^Kanban.*Ticket.*md$` for `Kanban/Tickets/*.md`.
- Settings preview and status bar use the same matching logic for consistent results.

## Minimum Obsidian version
- `1.5.12`

## Notes
- Added rule engine tests and run them before build.

releases.author: eugeny-dementev
releases.description:
# Briefmaker 0.5.0

## Highlights
- `{{filePath}}` now resolves to the full absolute path (matching Obsidian’s “Copy full path”).
- Rule test preview shows full path when available.
- README updated to clarify `{{filePath}}` behavior.

## Minimum Obsidian version
- `1.5.12`

## Notes
- Briefmaker only generates prompts and copies them to clipboard.
- No APIs are called and no notes are modified automatically.

releases.author: eugeny-dementev
releases.description:
# 0.4.0

## Highlights
- Added Obsidian ESLint plugin setup for local review checks.
- Linting now runs as part of `npm run build`.
- Cleaned up typed settings loading and removed deprecated clipboard fallback.

## Minimum Obsidian version
- `1.5.12`

## Notes
- Briefmaker only generates prompts and copies them to clipboard.
- No APIs are called and no notes are modified automatically.

releases.author: eugeny-dementev
releases.description:
# 0.3.0

## Highlights
- Review-bot compliance: sentence case UI text and command names without plugin prefix.
- Clipboard handling updated to avoid deprecated APIs.
- Settings validation styles moved to CSS classes.
- Minimum Obsidian version raised to 1.5.12.

## Minimum Obsidian version
- `1.5.12`

## Notes
- Briefmaker only generates prompts and copies them to clipboard.
- No APIs are called and no notes are modified automatically.

releases.author: eugeny-dementev
releases.description:
# 0.2.0

## Highlights
- New copy-on-hover buttons for preview blocks in settings and modal.
- Previews now render as code blocks with full-width wrapping and no horizontal scrolling.
- Settings preview uses consistent styling and easier copy behavior.

## Minimum Obsidian version
- `1.2.0`

## Notes
- This plugin only generates prompts and copies them to clipboard.
- No APIs are called and no notes are modified automatically.

releases.author: eugeny-dementev
releases.description:
# 0.1.0

## Highlights
- Initial release of Briefmaker.
- Path-based template rules (regex) with ordered matching.
- Task extraction for unchecked items and brief generation from template for AI agent

## Minimum Obsidian version
- `1.2.0`

## Notes
- This plugin only generates prompts and copies them to clipboard.
- No APIs are called and no notes are modified automatically.
